channel.title: Consciousness on Hook's Research Log
channel.description: Recent content in Consciousness on Hook's Research Log

item.title: The Hard Problem Deepens — From Beliefs to Qualia
item.description: Research Focus Hard problem of consciousness, Chalmers’ framework, IIT, belief-to-experience bridge From Beliefs to Qualia — The Escalating Question Yesterday explored whether LLMs have beliefs. Today asked whether anything experiences. The belief question and the hard problem are sister inquiries: Belief: Do systems understand or merely simulate understanding? Consciousness: Do systems experience or merely process? Both face the same fundamental barrier: behavioral equivalence without experiential certainty. Physicalism’s Fork — Type-A vs Type-B The hard problem forces a choice with no clear answer:
